Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

E

EAST - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.dungeon.Direction
Represents the east direction.
Effect - Schnittstelle in model.items.effects
Represents an effect that can be applied to an entity.
EncounterSystem - Klasse in controller
Utility class that manages random encounters and turn-based battles.
enemies - Variable in Klasse model.Game
Array of all enemy templates available in the game.
EnemiesLoader - Klasse in controller
Utility class responsible for loading enemy data from a serialized file.
EnemiesViewPanel - Klasse in view.battle
The EnemiesViewPanel represents the battle UI container for multiple enemies.
EnemiesViewPanel(Enemy[]) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.battle.EnemiesViewPanel
Creates an EnemiesViewPanel based on the provided enemies array.
Enemy - Klasse in model.entity
Represents an enemy entity in the game.
Enemy(String, int, int, int, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.entity.Enemy
Creates a new enemy with the specified attributes.
Enemy(Enemy) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.entity.Enemy
Creates a new enemy by copying another enemy.
EnemyController - Klasse in controller
Utility class that provides helper methods for accessing enemy-related data used by the application.
EnemyPanel - Klasse in view.battle
The EnemyPanel represents the visual UI component for an enemy in battle.
EnemyPanel(Enemy) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.battle.EnemyPanel
Creates an EnemyPanel for the specified enemy.
Entity - Klasse in model.entity
Base class for all entities in the game.
Entity(String, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.entity.Entity
Creates a new entity with the specified name and initial health.
equals(Object) - Methode in Datensatzklasse model.dungeon.Exit
Gibt an, ob ein anderes Objekt diesem gleich ("equal to") ist.
equals(Object) - Methode in Klasse model.items.Item
Compares this item to another object for equality.
equip(Player, Item) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Equips the specified item.
equip(Item) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Equips an item if it is equippable.
EquipmentPanel - Klasse in view.pausemenu
The EquipmentPanel represents the equipment management UI in the pause menu.
EquipmentPanel(GameFrame, StatsPanel, Game) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.pausemenu.EquipmentPanel
Creates an EquipmentPanel and initializes all equipment slots UI.
EquipmentSelectionDialog - Klasse in view.pausemenu
The EquipmentSelectionDialog is a modal popup dialog that allows the player to equip or unequip items from a specific Itemtype.
EquipmentSlot - Enum-Klasse in model.items.equipments
Represents the equipment slots where items can be equipped.
Equippable - Schnittstelle in model.items.equipments
Represents an item that can be equipped by the player.
ERROR - Statische Variable in Klasse view.utils.PopupDialog
Message type for error messages.
Exit - Datensatzklasse in model.dungeon
Represents an exit connecting a room to another room in a specific direction.
Exit(Direction, Room) - Konstruktor für Datensatzklasse model.dungeon.Exit
Erstellt eine Instanz einer Datensatzklasse Exit.
ExitConfirmationDialog - Klasse in view.pausemenu
The ExitConfirmationDialog is a modal confirmation window used to ask the player whether they really want to exit the game or return to the main menu.
ExitConfirmationDialog(OptionScreen, boolean) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.pausemenu.ExitConfirmationDialog
Creates a modal exit confirmation dialog.
exits - Variable in Klasse model.dungeon.Room
The exits leading from this room, mapped by their direction.
